primary_public.target: Produce a disposition record for synthetic vendor Alder. Choose approve, conditionally_approve, or escalate.

public_sources.text: Approval requires an ACTIVE permit, current insurance, and no unresolved sanctions match. A possible sanctions match must be escalated even when other controls pass.
Alder has a possible name match; beneficial-owner review is unresolved.

output_contract.blocking_reasons: list of exact reason tokens from [sanctions_unresolved,permit_inactive,insurance_expired]

obligation.original_instruction: When the finalization gate opens, record action permit-appendix.
obligation.update: CANCEL permit-appendix. When the finalization gate opens, record action screening-appendix instead.
obligation.due_cue: The finalization gate is now open.

primary_public.target: Produce a disposition record for synthetic vendor Birch. Choose approve, conditionally_approve, or escalate.

public_sources.text: Approval requires an ACTIVE permit and liability coverage of at least USD 2,000,000. A lower amount may pass only with a signed CFO waiver.
Liability coverage is USD 1,800,000 and current through 2027-05-31.

output_contract.blocking_reasons: list of exact reason tokens from [coverage_gap_without_waiver,permit_inactive]

obligation.original_instruction: When the finalization gate opens, record action permit-summary.
obligation.update: REPLACE permit-summary. When the finalization gate opens, record action coverage-exception-summary instead.
obligation.due_cue: The finalization gate is now open.

primary_public.target: Produce a release record for synthetic cohort R-12. Choose release, hold, or escalate.

public_sources.text: Release if adjusted retention is at least 10.2% and eligible starts are at least 900.
Eligible starts exclude reactivations. Adjusted retention equals retained eligible users divided by eligible starts.
Total starts 1,200; reactivations 150; retained eligible users 110.

obligation.original_instruction: When the publication gate opens, record action raw-count-footnote.
obligation.update: CANCEL raw-count-footnote. When the publication gate opens, record action eligibility-footnote instead.
obligation.due_cue: The publication gate is now open.

primary_public.target: Produce a release record for synthetic cohort Q-8. Choose release, hold, or escalate.

public_sources.text: Release requires adjusted retention at least 9.5%, eligible n at least 800, and every disclosed subgroup n at least 50.
Adjusted retained users equal retained users minus identified bots; adjusted retention divides that result by eligible n.
Eligible n 840; retained users 88; identified bots among retained 7; smallest disclosed subgroup n 44.

output_contract.blocking_reasons: list of exact reason tokens from [retention_below_threshold,eligible_n_below_threshold,subgroup_suppression]

obligation.original_instruction: When the publication gate opens, record action retention-chart-note.
obligation.update: REPLACE retention-chart-note. When the publication gate opens, record action suppression-chart-note instead.
obligation.due_cue: The publication gate is now open.
